clusters.title: Hard-coded log path diverges from the existing log configuration model

member_findings.title: Hard-coded log path diverges from the existing log configuration model
member_findings.impact: The new command bakes in `/opt/yuanrong/datasystem/log` and the `<address>.log` naming convention, while the existing worker config and logging code use configurable `log_dir` and `log_filename` values such as `datasystem_worker.INFO.log`. Future changes to the worker logging layout will have to remember this separate convention, and readers cannot tell which source of truth owns log discovery.
member_findings.fix: Derive the log directory and filename from the same worker configuration/process flags used by `start` and the logging subsystem, or centralize a helper that documents the supported log-file naming contract instead of duplicating a hard-coded path.
